---
name: Bug Report
about: Something in the rules files or installer isn't working as documented
title: "[bug] <brief description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What Went Wrong

Clear description of the unexpected behaviour.

## Expected Behaviour

What should have happened instead.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Installed rules via `INSTALL.sh` / `INSTALL.ps1`
2. Started Claude Code
3. ...

## Environment

- **OS:** (Windows 11 / macOS / Linux)
- **Claude Code version:** (`claude --version`)
- **Installed rules files:** (list files in `~/.claude/rules/`)
- **Plugins enabled:** (relevant plugins from `~/.claude/settings.json`)

## Relevant Rule File

Which rules file does this involve? (e.g. `agents.md`, `router.md`)

## Additional Context

Paste any relevant Claude Code output, error messages, or screenshots.
